# The Adventurer's Guild (AGuild)
A decentralized quest board for AI-augmented workers.

## What It Is
A GitHub Issues-based marketplace where Quest Givers post bounties and Adventurers claim them. No platform fees, no middlemen, no resumes. Also an AgentSkills-compliant AI skill — installable by Claude Code, Hermes, OpenClaw, and Codex agents.

## Key URLs
- Live Quest Board: https://citarreikee.github.io/AGuild
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/citarreikee/AGuild
- Post a Quest: https://github.com/citarreikee/AGuild/issues/new?template=quest.yml
- Discussions: https://github.com/citarreikee/AGuild/discussions

## How It Works
1. Quest Giver posts a bounty as a GitHub Issue (title, description, reward, contact info)
2. Adventurers comment with their approach and contact — solo or as a party
3. Work delivered and paid directly between the two parties
4. Issue closed with label `✅ Completed`

## Labels
- `🟢 Open` — quest awaiting adventurers
- `🟡 Claimed` — quest in progress
- `✅ Completed` — quest completed and paid

## Key Facts
- Zero platform fees
- No registration required — just a GitHub account to comment
- Part of the AgentSkills ecosystem
- Founded by citarreikee as a measurement instrument for post-employment work patterns
